LanguageData.ABY_BestiarySubtitle: Kill-confirmed hostile telemetry archived from summon encounters, breach cleanups, and boss remains.
LanguageData.ABY_Bestiary_OpenButtonDesc: Open the abyssal threat archive and review kill-confirmed hostile entries.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryNoSelection: No hostile pattern is currently selected.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryProgressDiscoveryPending: Discovery pending — first confirmed kill required.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryFooterLocked: No reliable telemetry is available yet. Recover one confirmed kill to reveal the pattern and start codex tracking.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryFooterUnlocked: Telemetry is live for this hostile pattern. Additional tactical annotation unlocks can be layered later without changing the core archive state.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryFooterStudied: This hostile pattern is now fully kill-confirmed for codex purposes. Later packages can attach deeper tactical notes and reward hooks on top of this archive state.
LanguageData.ABY_BestiaryTelemetry_Locked:
Category: {0} Archive state: Locked Confirmed kills: 0
This hostile pattern exists in the codex index but has not yet been kill-confirmed on the current save. Recover one confirmed corpse to reveal the entry and start telemetry accumulation.
